prose.en: Verify that individuals accessing a system processing, storing, or transmitting information requiring special protection:
Have valid access authorizations that are demonstrated by assigned official government duties; and

guidance.en: Organizational information that requires special protection includes controlled unclassified information. Personnel security criteria include position sensitivity background screening requirements.

prose.en: individuals accessing a system processing, storing, or transmitting information requiring special protection have valid access authorizations that are demonstrated by assigned official government duties;
individuals accessing a system processing, storing, or transmitting information requiring special protection satisfy {param:ps-03.03_odp}.

objects.en: access control policy, procedures addressing personnel screening
Organizational personnel with personnel security responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for ensuring valid access authorizations for information requiring special protection
organizational process for additional personnel screening for information requiring special protection

guidelines.en: additional personnel screening criteria to be satisfied for individuals accessing a system processing, storing, or transmitting information requiring special protection are defined;
